programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Listing
programme.desc: An uptight, hardworking realty owner who has lost her Christmas spirit has to spend five days at a Christmas Inn with her business competitor in order to win over the badly needed listing of the Erickson Farmstead.

programme.title: Movie: Let's Meet Again on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: College sweethearts get opportunities on opposite sides of the world, so they decide to part ways and meet again in two years on Christmas Eve to see if they are really meant to be.

programme.title: Movie: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: After returning to her hometown for Christmas, a woman finds her home lacks Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Tabora Family - Part 4
programme.desc: While the team at the house shifts gears towards design and décor, we brought the Tabora's off-site for a special surprise. Tune in to see what's in store for this deserving Marine family.

programme.title: Movie: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: An event planner who has given up on love, but one day, she meets the perfect man. After learning that Mr. Perfect is being transferred overseas for work, she asks Santa to work his magic and bring them together.

programme.title: Movie: Wrapped Up in Christmas
programme.desc: A mall Santa is trying to find his way after quitting his job, until he meets an unfriendly Christmas Grinch in the form of the mall manager.

programme.title: Movie: A Date by Christmas Eve
programme.desc: When a dating app gives her magical powers, a young woman must set things right by Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: A young woman makes her special holiday wish and must decide between a new love interest and an old friend.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Murder in the Church
programme.desc: Missy Bevers was a mom and a fitness instructor in her community. As she’s setting up for an early-morning workout class at the local church, surveillance cameras capture a disturbing series of images; her killer, lurking the halls.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Shopping With a Killer
programme.desc: 8-year-old Cherish Perrywinkle is lured out of a Walmart by a registered sex offender, but that’s just the beginning of a night of terror, all caught on camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Repo
programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: BattleBots: Return of the Bots
programme.desc: Hard-hitting, steel-splitting combat returns as 60 teams converge for a tournament of all-out robotic carnage! Jack Barker from End Game finally gets the match he's been waiting for as he squares off with Ray Billings and his lethal bot Tombstone.

programme.title: BattleBots: Let the Big Bot Battle Begin
programme.desc: The 2019 runner-up Witch Doctor starts their campaign against last year's breakout-bot Hydra. Titans Mammoth and Huge face off in an epic battle of the big bots and the elusive Black Dragon risks robotic life and limb against Kraken.

programme.title: Rocket Around the Christmas Tree: Spatial Delivery
programme.desc: Three teams face off in a festive engineering challenge that will have them blasting trees into the center of Christmas Town, sending snowmen sky high and assisting Santa in his chimney ascent; failure to launch will have them on this year's naughty list.

programme.title: Rocket Around the Christmas Tree: Oh, Tannen-Bomb!
programme.desc: Three teams of merry masterminds compete to see who can pack their pines with the most firepower, save Christmas Town from an Abominable Snowman and send toy soldiers to the gifting front lines; missing the mark will get their names on the naughty list.

programme.title: BattleBots: Let the Big Bot Battle Begin
programme.desc: The 2019 runner-up Witch Doctor starts their campaign against last year's breakout-bot Hydra. Titans Mammoth and Huge face off in an epic battle of the big bots and the elusive Black Dragon risks robotic life and limb against Kraken.

programme.title: Rocket Around the Christmas Tree: Spatial Delivery
programme.desc: Three teams face off in a festive engineering challenge that will have them blasting trees into the center of Christmas Town, sending snowmen sky high and assisting Santa in his chimney ascent; failure to launch will have them on this year's naughty list.

programme.title: Rocket Around the Christmas Tree: Oh, Tannen-Bomb!
programme.desc: Three teams of merry masterminds compete to see who can pack their pines with the most firepower, save Christmas Town from an Abominable Snowman and send toy soldiers to the gifting front lines; missing the mark will get their names on the naughty list.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps and his team prepare to flip a 20,000-pound carnivore fossil out of the earth and onto a flatbed to get it to the lab for analysis. Meanwhile, Mike Harris hunts for a duckbill skull and Jared Hudson uncovers an ancient reptile.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Shots Fired
programme.desc: Clayton must haul his 20,000-pound dinosaur fossil over 200 miles to a lab where it will finally be identified. The Harris/Bolan clan chases poachers off of their land and Jared makes a last-ditch effort to bring in some money this season.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: We Got Skull
programme.desc: With their prized carnivore fossil finally at the lab, Clayton returns to his ranch in Montana to hunt for quick finds at Old Faithful. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his team continue excavating their triceratops site hoping to uncover the valuable horns.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: The Verdict is In: Nano or T-Rex
programme.desc: In Montana, Clayton Phipps prepares to learn if his carnivore skeleton belongs to a T-Rex or the controversial nanotyrannus. Meanwhile in Wyoming, Mike Harris and Aaron Bolan race against the impending winter digging at a promising new site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hard Times Make the Best Shine
programme.desc: With national supply chains disrupted, Mark and Digger unearth a ton of free ingredients, Tickle helps Josh build a submarine still farm and Mike designs a first-ever backwoods column still, perfect for endless runs of high-quality low-cost liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Interstate Alliance
programme.desc: Josh and Tickle make a peach brandy-making alliance when Josh lands a windfall of peaches. Mark and Diggers' surplus corn supply mysteriously disappears. Mike and Jerry panic when their column still spews ethanol vapor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mark and Digger's Big Test
programme.desc: With his partner in quarantine, Digger has much more on the line than shine. Mike and Jerry's moonshine Frankenstein turns on its creators. After decades in the backwoods, mountain man Mark Rogers enlists his dad to run with him for the first time.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Good as Gold
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys race against time and put their new crew members to the test to rebuild their mine sites and haul heavy equipment to the Trifecta and Rockfall Ravine. Their first dive is golden and promises a successful season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Swallowed Up
programme.desc: Carlos, Dustin and James battle fast and violent rapids. They must engineer a way to slow the rapids down or risk being washed over the 80-foot waterfall. A faulty dredge valve on Fred's operation becomes explosive.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Mammoth Claw
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is finally down to virgin ground but discovers their equipment is no match for the giant boulders at Rockfall Ravine, so Wes fabricates a new tool for their arsenal: The Mammoth Claw. Fred puts greenhorn Scott to the test.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: This Is Garbage Land
programme.desc: A compulsive hoarder and Elvis impersonator spends his days collecting Elvis memorabilia, which has left his apartment virtually uninhabitable.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Terry and Bill seem to be the perfect couple, but their dark secret has put their relationship in jeopardy. The tragic murder of her daughter drove Nancy to hoarding. Now, if she can't clear her home, she may just lose her husband as well.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Tiny Monsters
programme.desc: Sherry's hoard has broken up her marriage and authorities are threatening to take away her children and condemn her home.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Surviving on Trash
programme.desc: Pregnant with her first, Traci wants to move back into her childhood home, but it's filled floor to ceiling with her mother's stuff.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Owned by the Roaches
programme.desc: Celia is a psychologist who helps other but can't solve her own hoarding problem. She is losing the battle against her stuff and the millions of roaches infesting her home.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Losing Half Myself
programme.desc: Phyllis and Patty aren't just identical twins, they're identical twin hoarders. They've transformed every home in which they've ever lived into a complete disaster area.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A Horrible Sight
programme.desc: Rick tries to salvage his cluttered home that was nearly destroyed in a house fire.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Prison of Garbage
programme.desc: Deborah and Mary both started hoarding in the wake of a personal tragedy. After Deborah killed her drug-addicted boyfriend in self-defence, she and her son have lived amid growing piles of trash and unused possessions.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Owned by the Roaches
programme.desc: Celia is a psychologist who helps other but can't solve her own hoarding problem. She is losing the battle against her stuff and the millions of roaches infesting her home.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A Horrible Sight
programme.desc: Rick tries to salvage his cluttered home that was nearly destroyed in a house fire.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Prison of Garbage
programme.desc: Deborah and Mary both started hoarding in the wake of a personal tragedy. After Deborah killed her drug-addicted boyfriend in self-defence, she and her son have lived amid growing piles of trash and unused possessions.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Coronavirus Crisis
programme.desc: Coronavirus has hit the Waldrops hard. School and sports are on hold, and Courtney's parents can no longer provide much-needed help during the day. In addition, Eric stops construction on the remodel as the family faces an uncertain financial future.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Survival Mode
programme.desc: After years of renovations, the Waldrops finally move into their new home. School is starting for the boys, and fears of COVID-19 lead Courtney and Eric to consider homeschooling. They also decide to send the sextuplets to a speech pathologist.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Princess for a Day
programme.desc: Diva Latoya wants to walk down the aisle in a blinged-out ball gown. After months of chemo and currently cancer-free, Kristin is ready to marry her high school sweetheart.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Always the Pageant Girl...
programme.desc: Ashley, former Miss New Jersey, is desperate for a dress that puts her pageant days behind her. Rodeo queen Becky wants a gown with bling. Having tried over 100 dresses, Melissa desires something to stand out from the crowd.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Is It Crown-Worthy?
programme.desc: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: The Bride Strikes Back
programme.desc: A 'Star Wars' obsessed bride is set on looking like Princess Leia on her big day. A Southern belle is determined to find a groovy dress for her vintage hippie-themed wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Team Spirit
programme.desc: Bride Mallory is torn between trendy versus conservative, and Lorie has recently lost over 100 pounds but struggles to get comfortable in her new skin.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Multiple Dress Personality Disorder
programme.desc: WNBA star and bride Angel has a game plan to say yes to a pantsuit, but her friend thinks she should sport a dress. Bride Angel's fiancée, Brande, isn't sure about the kind of dress she wants. Meanwhile, bride Cassie is on the hunt for the perfect veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Gone With the Wind Fabulous
programme.desc: Returning raucous bride Stacy is back again to find another dress to reflect her motorcycle-chic style. Bride Jessica wants a modern dress for her beach wedding but her mother-in-law is set on tradition.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Kelly and Rebecca
programme.desc: Kelly shows her best friend her stockpile and takes her along on a shopping spree to show off her skills. Rebecca brings her skeptical husband along to spark some interest.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Heather and Bree
programme.desc: Heather shops for groceries and baby clothes at Kmart. Bree makes her own laundry detergent and tries to beat her budget of $140 a month for groceries.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing
programme.desc: Profiles four shopaholics who use coupons to save thousands of dollars and amass huge stockpiles of goods. These shoppers dumpster dive for coupons and spend hours a day searching the Internet for deals.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Glass Slipper
programme.desc: Danielle hopes to enchant her guests with her glass slippers; family-focused Kitty plans to sing her own processional song.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Bling Team!
programme.desc: Toni decorates her big day with modern minimalism while Tamekia has blinged out every inch of her wedding.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Hookah Lounge
programme.desc: Shannon's wedding becomes a vintage affair because of her love of antique keys; Sarah's BBQ hoedown starts at the watering hole.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whitney's Long-Distance Relationship
programme.desc: Agonizing over his blow up with Whitney, Buddy seeks her out to apologize but scares her with the intensity of his reaction. When Whitney visits Chase in Wilmington, North Carolina, for the weekend, he gives her an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Double Book
programme.desc: Desperate times call for desperate measures and the guys are ready for a family vacation R,S,V,P have a sneaky surprise to get the girls back together, but Deena has a surprise of her own that could complicate everything.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Single Ronnie
programme.desc: The countdown to Angelina's arrival is on and the guys need to figure out how to break the news to Deena. Meanwhile, the squad tries to play matchmaker by creating a dating show for single Ronnie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Trouble Shot At Love
programme.desc: Hosted by dating show experts: DJ Pauly D and Vinny Guadagnino, six girls will compete for the love of the ultimate bachelor, Ronnie Magro, on the brand new dating show, 'A trouble shot at love.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The 500th Episode
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo celebrate their milestone five hundredth episode with naked chaos, get hit from behind in booty shots, and make it happen when it counts in extra clutch.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Trina
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steele welcome legendary rapper Trina to discuss what it means to be da baddest, girls who shine bright in diamond dolls, and why sometimes you just gotta let 'em fight.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Trey Songz
programme.desc: Trey Songz joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to experience pain pleasure, watch out for Mr. Steal Your Girl, and learn to love electricity with some people feeling the spark.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXLVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo check out the new sport hammered throw, enjoy a game of America's smashtime, and witness the best escapes in you'll never take me alive.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tommy Lee
programme.desc: Tommy Lee joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they enter 'total mayhem', get blown away by 'industrial size fans', and roll around 'in the dirt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo fear for the youth in 'warning signs', confront ceiling monsters in 'fan-tasm', and peak around the main cabin for some 'in-flight entertainment'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Kaitlyn Farrington
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist Kaitlyn Farrington joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about 'Other Sochi Games,' 'Pokeaphobia,' and what it means to be a 'Virgin Larper.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXVII
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo talk about the pitfalls of giving ‘111 percent’, the discomfort that is ‘weird love’, and feeling like you're at ‘the wrong party’.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Axel Hodges

programme.desc: In Dallas, a dismembered body is found burned in an open field. With no leads on the victim's identity, detectives turn to the public for help in solving this baffling case.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food Ya Never Ate Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe try a dish they've never eaten, and a special guest stops by. Plus, Q drops a world premiere music video for his diabolical new song.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Zero Donut Thirty
programme.desc: This episode includes a horrifying Halloween mask removal, a couple attacking a hornet's nest and an impossible task: getting the good donuts out of the conference room without being noticed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: Find out what names the Jokers didn't get to in the name game challenge and who always laughs at a fart joke. Plus, learn which Joker has been stung by a jellyfish.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Rivals
programme.desc: A dramatic change in the Russian crab industry rocks global markets and drives new competition between Dutch Harbor captains and their Russian adversaries. As crab prices skyrocket legendary captains return to claim their piece of a historic payday.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Typhoon Hagibis
programme.desc: Jake and Jonathan must make joint decisions when a typhoon strikes. Sig races to make the first offload while repairs have the Cornelia Marie in the eye on the storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Still reeling from deadly typhoon Hagibis, the fleet claws its way back into competition against the Russians. The pressure to make up ground has mounted and it's do-or-die for the captains, even if it means danger or even war.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Shotguns and Fist Fights
programme.desc: Johnathan and Jake blast a shotgun at their problems and a fist fight breaks out on the Seabrooke while Wild Bill blows an engine and Mandy bets on science.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Double Agent
programme.desc: The Cornelia Marie uses U.S. satellites to spy on the Russians, Scott pioneers a dormant fishery and Wild Bill faces off with a Russian greenhorn.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: No Safe Passage
programme.desc: The captains grapple with the loss of their friends on the Scandies Rose. Junior narrowly escapes disaster. Johnathan speaks out about the Time Bandit.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Into the Red
programme.desc: Co-captains Jake and Johnathan try to form an alliance with rival Keith Colburn. Junior risks crossing into Russian waters for golden crab and Josh bets it all on a gut feeling. Later, Wild Bill turns to his last resort and seeks work in Russia.

programme.desc: Still reeling from deadly typhoon Hagibis, the fleet claws its way back into competition against the Russians. The pressure to make up ground has mounted and it's do-or-die for the captains, even if it means danger or even war.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Southern Rocky Mountain Wolf
programme.desc: The Southern Rocky Mountain wolf hasn't been seen in almost 80 years, but recent cattle attacks spark the possibility that is still exists. Trekking high into the Sierras, Forrest is determined to bring it out of hiding.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant
programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Caribbean Monk Seal
programme.desc: Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. To prove its existence, he and the crew descend into deep waters where they come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Hidden Turtle of Vietnam
programme.desc: In Vietnam, Forrest teams up with a conservation group to save the largest turtle species in the world from extinction. Using cutting edge technology, they attempt to find a suitor for the last and only surviving giant softshell.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Ivory Billed Woodpecker of the Bayou
programme.desc: Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists. The alligator and poisonous snake infested swamps of Louisiana make for a challenging mission, but he is prepared for anything.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dodo of the North
programme.desc: Forrest travels to the Faroe Islands to look for any trace of the Great Auk. The search takes him through some of the most scenic and rugged terrain he's ever attempted in his passionate search for a large flightless seabird that has been long forgotten.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Formosan Clouded Leopard
programme.desc: Declared extinct only recently, Forrest is tracking clues and eyewitness accounts that suggest that the Formosan Clouded Leopard could still be alive. He treks deep into the jungles of Taiwan where a run-in with a predator might just solve a mystery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Zanzibar Leopard
programme.desc: Forrest sets out on a history-making expedition in Zanzibar, revealing species that have never before been filmed. He captures evidence that leads to an unforgettable conclusion on the Zanzibar Leopard, an animal that was declared extinct 25 years ago.

programme.title: Movie: The Best Man

programme.title: UFO Files: Real UFOs
programme.desc: Ever since the military started using sophisticated airplanes, they have sought ways to build an aircraft that can fly undetected, manoeuvre like a helicopter and fly like a jet. The Nazis first pursued the idea of a disc-shaped aircraft.

programme.title: UFO Files: Canada's Roswell
programme.desc: Roswell is one of the most famous UFO cases in United States history and Canada may have a similar case with a verifiable paper trail. On the night of October 4, 1967, dozens of eyewitnesses in Nova Scotia reported UFO sightings.

programme.title: UFO Files: Texas' Roswell
programme.desc: Five years before the Wright Brothers flew at Kitty Hawk, a mysterious airship crashes in the town of Aurora, Texas in 1897. This episode separates fact from fiction as we hunt for the alien graveyard and study the mysterious metal found at the site.

programme.title: UFO Files: Britain's Roswell
programme.desc: Over three nights in December 1980, Air Force personnel stationed at a NATO installation in England witness strange lights in the sky. On the night of the 25th, servicemen come upon a glowing triangular metallic craft in the woods.

programme.title: UFO Files: Brazil's Roswell
programme.desc: A luminous object hovers near the Brazilian island of Colares in the Amazon delta.

programme.title: UFO Files: Beyond The War of The Worlds
programme.desc: Trace H.G. Wells' best-written work beginning with the origins of his story and the amazing broadcast that drove thousands into a panic in 1938. Witness also the second broadcast in 1968 that again drove thousands into a panic street frenzy in Buffalo.

programme.title: UFO Files: Russian Roswell
programme.desc: Welcome to the remote, top-secret military base Kapustin Yar, the Soviet Area 51, where the wreckage from no fewer than eight UFO crash incidents and their occupants were transported and studied between 1945 and 1991.

programme.title: UFO Files: The Day After Roswell
programme.desc: Delve into the aftermath and repercussions of the 1947 Roswell incident.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mystery of Puma Punku
programme.desc: At nearly 14,000 years old, the ruins of Puma Punku are the oldest and most baffling on the face of the Earth. No one knows who designed and built this complex of sophisticated inter-locking blocks, and then vanished.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate the demise of historically flourishing communities: Pablo Escobar's sprawling compound, an elaborate fairy tale estate and a deserted city that was once home to thousands.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Mystery at Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three inmates are said to have escaped from Alcatraz prison, but even today, it's never been proven. New evidence might finally crack this notorious cold case, as experts use forensic science and cutting-edge tech to investigate fresh leads.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: Giant magnetic bubbles millions of miles wide, bizarre invisible matter, and a death star tearing through bands of icy comets, flinging them into violent orbits. All this and more could be inside our cosmic backyard, and effecting our lives on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extinction
programme.desc: Asteroids strike, planets collide, black holes blast out death rays, volcanoes erupt and ice engulfs the planet. These are the universe's weapons of extinction. They've happened before - wiping out entire species, and they will happen again.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Milky Way
programme.desc: New research may now be able to answer the question that asks what built the Milky Way. In the very centre of our galaxy is an extremely large black hole that is one of the most destructive objects in the universe. This could possibly be the answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Fire in the Cockpit
programme.desc: Some believe the fire on Apollo 1 that killed three astronauts was a top-secret cover-up, and a team of experts investigate if this disaster was a tragic accident or part of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: NASA Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of America's greatest achievements is also one of its most controversial, and now, a team of experts investigate if there was a conspiracy to fake the moon landing, uncovering a secret report on hundreds of Nazis' involved in the Apollo space program.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: CIA's Secret Space War
programme.desc: Confidential CIA files reveal a top-secret war for space between the US and the Soviets, and a team of experts investigate if new discoveries about American espionage during the Apollo program provide evidence of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Killing Armstrong
programme.desc: Apollo 11's lunar module nearly killed Neil Armstrong during training, and some believe this close-call could explain a conspiracy to fake the moon landing. A team of experts investigate if dangers that the Apollo 11 crew faced were motive for a cover-up.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Conspiracy of the Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech to hunt for the lost NASA tapes that recorded the Apollo 11 moon landing and shed light on a possible conspiracy, as some believe their disappearance is part of a cover-up to hide the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: The Hollywood Conspiracy
programme.desc: Some believe that the moon's waving American flag is the smoking gun that NASA faked the moon landing, and as a team of experts investigate this strange piece of evidence, the trail leads all the way to some of Hollywood's biggest names.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped. Then Kenda is nearly stumped when a group of teens discover human bones on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies' man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder. But a shocking revelation will turn his attention to a far more nefarious band of suspects.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: a dead man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness. But when the young victim's checkered past is uncovered, Kenda must wade through a laundry list of potential suspects to find the man's killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son Broke My Heart
programme.desc: When Vickie Webb's son warned her the police might come looking for him, she wasn't surprised. He had been getting into trouble, but she sensed this time was different.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: You Don't See Me, I Don't See You
programme.desc: When a charming 33-year-old is gunned down outside his home, detectives must comb over every detail of his personal life, professional dealings, and extracurricular activities to figure out who could commit such a brutal crime, and why.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: We Found Bonnie
programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing woman's three-year-old son.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: You Don't See Me, I Don't See You
programme.desc: When a charming 33-year-old is gunned down outside his home, detectives must comb over every detail of his personal life, professional dealings, and extracurricular activities to figure out who could commit such a brutal crime, and why.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: We Found Bonnie
programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing woman's three-year-old son.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Soap Star's Secret

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Grim Reaper
programme.desc: When Linda found out her biological father was her family friend, Greg Scarpa, she was overjoyed. But when the rest of Greg's bloody secrets came out, Linda learned that being part of his family wasn't just dangerous, it was potentially deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: High School Homicide
programme.desc: A high school love triangle tangled up with lust and envy, leads to a plot steeped in horror and tragedy too horrendous to believe. Later, a prideful policeman almost pulls off the perfect murder, until the case resurrects more than two decades later.

programme.desc: High school sweethearts Michelle and Britt rekindle their romance after nearly 20 years apart. But this small-town Georgia family is a far cry from the Brady Bunch, bringing unseen baggage that unleashes a nightmare of infidelity, violence and murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Tammy wins the heart of Larry, and their lives seem perfect. But Tammy starts looks to other men to occupy her time. As Larry grows suspicious, their marriage disintegrates into a high stakes hunt that will leave one dead and the other behind bars.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Knows No Borders
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Donald and Umi fall in love in Indonesia. But as Umi strives to become the perfect American woman in Don's native Kentucky, he longs for something or someone more exotic and when this unorthodox family is divided only one can conquer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Opposites Can Kill
programme.desc: Young single mom Kathy wants a good life for herself and her son. That life soon includes wannabe rap star Juan, who has ambitions of his own. But their dreams clash and tempers erupt when Kathy decides she wants more out of life: no matter what the cost.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Wrath of Love
programme.desc: Zach Sanders is being pulled in two directions between the woman he loves and his mistress who refuses to let him go. Jealousy, obsession and news of a surprise engagement leads to a deadly case of road rage.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Frozen Heart
programme.desc: Glenn Godfrey was Alaska's top cop, but he may not be able to protect himself and his family from an evil force unleashed by an ill-advised romance.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Evil Eye
programme.desc: Not long after Patrick Brown falls for a woman named Cece, he is plagued by mysterious phone calls and a creepy sense that someone is watching him. He begins to wonder if it might be a figment of his imagination.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Murder on Camera
programme.desc: Tiana Notice is young, beautiful, brilliant and lonely. That changes when she meets James Carter online. But when James reveals a dark secret, the two find themselves drawn into an increasingly dangerous and ultimately deadly battle of wits.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: A young college student embarks on a secret affair with a police officer.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: To Love, Honor, and Kill
programme.desc: Noor and Marwan, young Iraqi American teens from feuding households, fall in love despite Noor's family's opposition.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Rome's Navy Seals
programme.desc: They are the amphibious Roman unit tasked with the impossible. Called Batavians, they led the invasion of ancient Britain in AD43. Discover the story behind a desperate mission deep in enemy territory that may hand the emperor an unlikely victory.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Rome's Navy Seals
programme.desc: They are the amphibious Roman unit tasked with the impossible. Called Batavians, they led the invasion of ancient Britain in AD43. Discover the story behind a desperate mission deep in enemy territory that may hand the emperor an unlikely victory.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sunrise Day Camp Clubhouse

programme.desc: Pete heads to Michigan to help a husband surprise his wife with a Swiss Family Robinson inspired treehouse for their anniversary. Far more advanced than its castaway motivation, the treehouse is supported with steel beams to hold tons of modern amenities.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trinity Lutheran Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Greencastle, PA, to salvage an old church that is being restored for a physical therapy office. The team struggles to figure out the best way to remove the windows, salvage the large bell and execute an idea for a console.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Yellow Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with an old Victorian that still has most of its original details.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Destined for Demo
programme.desc: Ashley is feeling extremely overwhelmed.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Coastal Cottage
programme.desc: Michael finds a 1931 craftsman bungalow that just came on the market which is near the beach and only $65,000.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Winner, Winner, Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Heading back to his Southern roots, Eddie Jackson is on the hunt for the best chicken dinners. Taking comfort food to the next level, these favorite dishes are trashy, messy and spicy. Winner, winner, it's chicken for dinner!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Veg Out
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares home-cooked meals that are packed with locally grown veggies straight from the plant or prepared in a way that no vegetable has ever dreamed. Get ready to veg out with a full day of eats- without the meat!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Philadelphia
programme.desc: We're going to Philadelphia to show you some of the best things we ever ate. There's impossibly delicious pasta at Vetri and perfect mashed potatoes at Parc.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: San Diego
programme.desc: San Diego may be the land of sun, surf and fun, but it's also home to some of the best dining spots around.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: El Paso
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is in El Paso, where Texas meets Mexico on the border as well as in the kitchen. The city is filled to the brim of its 10-gallon hat with Tex-Mex cuisine as well as Mexican classics.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: frankfurt
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Frankfurt where he samples everything from the classic frankfurter and apple wine to pork shoulder with sauerkraut and hand cheese with music.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Alaska's Inside Passage
programme.desc: Andrew gets a whole new taste of Alaska when he visits the Inside Passage. Andrew finds out that people in this part of Alaska are still making the most of the bounty that nature has provided. He tries sea cucumbers, salmon eggs, and roasted fish heads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Movie: All About Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A party planner has to decide between a romantic vacation and the biggest event of her career.

programme.title: Movie: Forever Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic reality TV producer finds herself falling for her mysterious new star.

programme.title: Movie: Twinkle All the Way
programme.desc: While planning a Christmas themed wedding, a wedding planner joins forces with the owner of a Christmas decoration company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: John Lennon Assassination

programme.title: Gold Rush: Breaking the Piggy Bank
programme.desc: Tony gambles on a hidden strip of paydirt. Parker's crew works overtime to run both wash plants in hope of a big payoff. Rick scrambles to keep is small crew running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: It's Alive

programme.title: Gold Rush: Big Red vs. Sluicifer
programme.desc: A competition erupts between Parker's two wash plant teams. Tony discovers a pile of lost gold. Fred Lewis' and veteran crew fire up The Colonel and face an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Rick's Sixth Sense
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Rick risks his entire season on a hunch and Tony mobilizes an entire arsenal for cash. Meanwhile, Fred's crew battles old equipment.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Fistful of Nuggets
programme.desc: Tony fires up a second plant to haul in lost gold. Parker departs for Alaska, leaving Mitch in charge. Rick faces a sluice box disaster. Fred Hurt makes a game changing discovery and Dustin finds chunky gold. Tony, Rick and Parker's crews join The Dirt.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.desc: A mysterious Templar relic features coded markings that could explain why these once-powerful knights disappeared and why their treasures were buried; using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate their final secrets.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A fuel transfer causes a series of explosions; a race boat crashes at 200 miles per hour; a base jumper is swept into a waterfall and a man is rescued after a helicopter crashes into water.
