programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Fitness Goals
programme.desc: Our interns examine surveillance videos, including a crocodile that breaks up a swimming pool hook-up and a bruising yacht dive fail.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Operation Hidden Roof
programme.desc: Featured in this episode are a machete-wielding vigilante in underwear, a swimming pool selfie stick debacle and a hoofed menace. Plus, the NSA interns dispose of an oddly erotic project.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Hilarious Moments
programme.desc: The greatest mistakes and mishaps ever caught on tape including an angry video gamer who goes from high score down to the floor, a young woman who takes her first swing at a golf ball, and a magician who turns a romantic dream into a reality.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Epic Fails
programme.desc: Watch as a speeding car takes out a snowman and a plow takes out a newsman. Plus, a showcase of hidden talents with a musical finger snapper and a child who conducts an entire church choir.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Where's the Bathroom?
programme.desc: Pete Lee reveals how millennials cure glaucoma, Michelle Buteau becomes a guidance counselor, and Matthew Broussard unmasks a German techno DJ in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Russian Interference
programme.desc: Gina Yashere obsesses over the contents of a crowd member's pants, Joel Kim Booster knows exactly what not to say as a Pilates teacher, and Dave Hill tries a unique style of crowd work.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: I Hate Myself
programme.desc: On this show, we learn three things: don't let Mo Amer call 911, don't ask Jenny Zigrino how you look, and never let Mo Mandel speak to the audience.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 14
programme.desc: Inept arsonists, butterfingered bank robbers and corrupt civil servants try and fail.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 18

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 25
programme.desc: Arsonists manage to torch themselves, a burglar locks himself into the store he's burglarizing, and a bank robber wearing a ski mask waits patiently in line for a teller.

programme.desc: It's been 17 years since John Bennett's childhood wish came true, and his teddy bear came to life. Now John's girlfriend Lori wants to marry him, but first she wants the vulgar, hedonistic Ted to move out of their lives. This proves easier said than done.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Long Standing Legacies

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Sammies
programme.desc: A food truck shuckin' and frying oysters for a po boy in Vancouver.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Duos
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out the combos that make some local hangouts a hit. In Denver, the double-duty corner bar smoking pork for its biscuits and topping pizzas with the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Servin' Up San Francisco
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. First, Guy swings by the repurposed garage in the Mission District for some southern hospitality.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Things New York
programme.desc: Guy's gets a taste of New York in and out of the Big Apple, including Eureka, California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eurocentric
programme.desc: Guy feasts on the many tastes of Europe in places across the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Celebrity Chefs
programme.desc: On this menu, there's killer cavatelli from Alex Guarnaschelli, Brooke Williamson's seafood roll, shrimp and sticky rice from Beau MacMillan, G. Garvin's short rib ragu and Buddy Valastro's famous lobster tail pastries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tennessee Holiday Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into the unique holiday traditions in Tennessee. In Hendersonville, the barbecue joint with a storied past serving up the traditional shoulder pull and a holiday ham with a fiery finish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Chili Three Ways
programme.desc: Guy Fieri crosses the border to Vancouver, British Columbia, to check in on an authentic Chinese place and see if their thousand chili chicken is as spicy as it sounds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: America's Favorites: Top-Notch Tastes
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and son Hunter pick the most creative of America's favorite joints to win $1,000 and a Triple-D feature. The duo crisscrosses the country from California to Colorado and Phoenix to Florida for bomb burgers, excellent empanadas and breakfast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From The Sea
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to see what the Triple D Nation is cookin' up from under the sea. For starters, an oyster shuckin' shack is putting a new spin on an old favorite in the Big Easy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Upper Crust
programme.desc: Guy visits a hoagie shop in Hollywood with home made rolls and a café in Portland, Oregon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homegrown and Homemade
programme.desc: Guy hits a restaurant South Carolina that serves collard greens right off the farm.

programme.desc: The Kitchen brings good tidings and a great menu of holiday cheer. Geoffrey Zakarian serves beef tenderloin with Jeff Mauro's blue cheesy Yorkshire puddings. Sunny Anderson brings garlicky lemon butter greens and Katie Lee makes mashed potatoes gratin.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Winter Wonderland Party
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts a holiday party for kids and transforms the house into a winter wonderland complete with snow globes and snowflakes. On the menu is creamy tomato soup, triple chocolate hot cocoa, crispy chicken sandwiches and Italian cookies.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Giada's Holiday Challenge
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis invites her cousins to bring an appetizer over for a Christmas party, and surprise guest Aunt Raffy judges which is the best.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: New Holiday Faves
programme.desc: Ree Drummond gets in the holiday spirit with apple, brie and mushrooms en croute, traditional eggnog in a ginger crumb-rimmed glass and an ugly sweater cake. She also makes berry basil vodka and festive marinated olives for a happy hour gift basket.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboy Drive-Through
programme.desc: Ree serves up sensational packed lunches at the Drummond drive-through. She makes ranch hand sandwiches with pop pulled pork and fixins, spicy sweet potato chips, a cowboy fruit salad and triple-chocolate cow pies.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Home Cooked for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts create a home-cooked holiday menu inspired by their own traditions, starting with Geoffrey Zakarian's Moroccan-spiced pork rack paired with Katie Lee's spinach and three cheese phyllo pie.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Easy Holiday Brunch

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf

programme.desc: A custody battle, a shooting and a suicide on the train tracks all point to one woman.

programme.title: Movie: Why Him?
programme.desc: Over the holidays, Ned takes his family to visit his daughter at Stanford. There, he meets her Silicon Valley billionaire boyfriend Laird. Immediately disliking him, an intense rivalry develops. Ned attempts to convince his daughter to break up with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Mansion Family

programme.title: The Simpsons: Saddlesore Galactica
programme.desc: After rescuing Duncan, a horse from the State Fair, Bart and Homer decide to train him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pygmoelian

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart to the Future

programme.title: The Simpsons: Days of Wine and D' Oh'Ses

programme.title: Movie: Why Him?
programme.desc: Over the holidays, Ned takes his family to visit his daughter at Stanford. There, he meets her Silicon Valley billionaire boyfriend Laird. Immediately disliking him, an intense rivalry develops. Ned attempts to convince his daughter to break up with him.

programme.title: Movie: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: After the death of his wife, Walter gathers his family before the holidays. He asks his family for one gift, that they get along. Each member realizes it will take a miracle for them to spend five days under the same roof without killing each other.

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather
programme.desc: A Mafia boss's innocent bookish son gets involved in the family business after a mob hit and becomes immersed in the world of organized crime.

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather II
programme.desc: Don Michael Corleone takes over and moves the family to Nevada, while flashbacks reveal his father's early days as an immigrant and a mobster in New York City.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show: Stephen Fry, Amanda Seyfried, Jamie Oliver, and Michael J. Fox
programme.desc: Graham trades quips with Stephen Fry, Amanda Seyfried, Jamie Oliver, Michael J. Fox, Tom Allen, Nina Sosanya and Dolly Parton.

programme.title: Movie: The Godfather
programme.desc: A Mafia boss's innocent bookish son gets involved in the family business after a mob hit and becomes immersed in the world of organized crime.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Our Man Bashir
programme.desc: Bashir poses as a 1960s secret agent in a malfunctioning holosuite program.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Homefront
programme.desc: Evidence that Changelings are targeting Earth sends Sisko back to his home planet.

programme.title: Earth's Great Seasons: Spring
programme.desc: Celebrate spring on planet Earth, and learn about the extraordinary tricks that animals and plants find to rise to the new challenges it brings.

programme.title: Earth's Great Seasons: Summer
programme.desc: Celebrate the glorious nature of summer on Earth and the extraordinary ways animals and plants rise to the challenges it brings.

programme.title: Earth's Great Seasons: Autumn
programme.desc: Celebrates the drama of Autumn and how animals and plants deal with the new challenges it brings. This is the time of year that brings the world's most spectacular transformations.

programme.title: Earth's Great Seasons: Winter
programme.desc: Celebrates winter and explores how animals and plants rise to the challenges it brings.

programme.title: Life: Plants
programme.desc: Enter the world of plants as time-lapse technology makes this violent and self-seeking organism's behaviour a truly dynamic and surprisingly emotional experience.

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey through Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Fish
programme.desc: Witness the secret and ferocious world of the great white and sailfish, the puffer fish and barracuda, in this extraordinary journey from open ocean to coral reef and from storm-ravaged surf zone to the abyssal depths.

programme.title: Life: Birds
programme.desc: Using specially developed aerial and underwater camera techniques to enter the world of birds, explore their incredible diversity and behaviour, and see these beautiful creatures in a whole new way.

programme.title: Inside World War II
programme.desc: Soldiers and civilians reflect upon life on the frontlines of war, during history's most violent conflict to date.

programme.title: Inside the Iraq War
programme.desc: We travel to worn-torn Iraq for an in-depth look at the grim reality of the last six years with harrowing personal accounts from the brave men and women who are living through it.

programme.title: Inside the Vietnam War
programme.desc: Highlighting American Veterans telling riveting first hand accounts of experience they had in the Vietnam War. See in country archival film footage, audio recordings and personal photos.

programme.title: Brothers in War
programme.desc: Revisit the harrowing, dramatic experiences of the men who made up Charlie Company in the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Inside the Afghanistan War
programme.desc: Follow the trajectory of the war in Afghanistan, from toppling the Taliban and driving out al Qaeda fighters in the chaotic days after 9/11 to the present day, as it's taken its place as America's longest war.

programme.title: Wild Galapagos
programme.desc: Join National Geographic's Pristine Seas as they explore the exciting, complex and unique waters of the Galapagos Islands.

programme.title: Wild Madagascar
programme.desc: Madagascar is home to creatures found nowhere else on Earth. From curious chameleons to loud lemurs, get a rare look at this amazing world of diverse and unique life.

programme.title: Wild Scotland: Spring Awakening
programme.desc: Spring is the most unpredictable of all seasons in the Highlands. Red squirrels, osprey and bottlenose dolphins must make the most of the season’s fleeting opportunities.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Realm of the Wombat
programme.desc: The hostile dry plains of southern Australia are home to some extraordinary and lethal animals including deadly ants, killer bunnies and the surprisingly vicious wombat.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: Unearthed: Jericho's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries at the lost city of Jericho offer fresh evidence about the biblical battle that brought its impregnable walls down. Using the latest tech, experts might reveal if Joshua and the Israelites really conquered this ancient city and how.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: From the Ground Up
programme.desc: A look at advances in renewable resources.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Climate Control Under Our Feet
programme.desc: Green buildings have worldwide attention, so George Davison sends Tamara Krinsky to investigate climate control using renewable resources.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Living in Sin
programme.desc: A Christian woman's faith is tested when she falls in love with a charming new female co-worker. As the forbidden lovers fight for their love in a community that doesn't want them, the pressure proves too much, and the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Turns to Hate
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion but so is hate.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mid Life Murder
programme.desc: These Deadly Women didn't grow old gracefully; they committed 'Mid-Life Murder.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Innocent blood spills when these deadly women reach their tipping point.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends Are Foes
programme.desc: Friendships can give us love and support, unless they turn toxic.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: Jealousy's a curse but it's never an excuse to kill.

programme.title: What the Nanny Cam Saw
programme.desc: A murder caught on camera gives investigators everything they need to nab a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are unthinkable.

programme.title: What the Nanny Cam Saw
programme.desc: A murder caught on camera gives investigators everything they need to nab a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Two can keep a secret, if one of them is dead. These Deadly Women think they've committed the perfect murders.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Prophet
programme.desc: To Kevin Currie, Mormon prophet Jeffrey Lundgren was more than a spiritual leader, he was a brother. But before long, Kevin realized that this Man of God was really a devil in disguise with an evil plan.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In Love With The Devil
programme.desc: Bernadette was 17 when her boyfriend, Brian Sugrim, told her he had murdered someone. But she didn't believe him. Only years later would she realize the true evil that Brian was capable of. Will a monster get away with murder?

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: The Eyeball Killer
programme.desc: Cops use their street smarts to find a killer who leaves women brutally murdered with their eyeballs surgically removed.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Monster Among Us
programme.desc: A monster hunts the streets of Baton Rouge, leaving three women raped, murdered and sadistically posed and everyone in town on edge. But when one brave woman survives a vicious attack, evidence leads police to the hunter and eventually justice.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: The Eastside Killer
programme.desc: A twisted murderer preys on young women in Bellevue Washington, leaving their bodies sadistically posed. As police work to draw a crucial connection, an unconventional clue surfaces and leads them to an unlikely killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Bound By Blood
programme.desc: The busy streets of Atlanta, GA are shaken as horror of the 'Necktie Killer' strikes the city with fear. Detectives from neighboring counties piece together correlative clues and distinctive apparel left behind at each crime scene.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: A Killer View
programme.desc: A young family builds their dream home in the Kentucky Hills, but their heaven is hell for the quiet couple living next door. Also, a dispute over a shared road leads to fireworks, fury, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Monkey in the Middle
programme.desc: A man finds himself living between hostile neighbors on both sides, including a former marine with severe PTSD. Their campaign of intimidation ramps up to the point of no return, ending with a deadly confrontation on the street outside their homes.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of Shards
programme.desc: A childish joke between neighbouring kids turns into an all-out war when the adults get involved. For some, the laughter will end forever.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Scared Silent
programme.desc: When Marshall Dent goes missing on Christmas Eve, the Native American community of Shawnee, Oklahoma bands together. After weeks of searching, Marshall is found in a shallow grave on sacred ground, leaving authorities scrambling to find the killer.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be the 'Green Baron'
programme.desc: Tony Darwin makes millions piloting marijuana into Florida. Even after getting caught, he continues works for a notorious smuggler until a deadly plane crash forces him to flee the country.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Vacation Homes
programme.desc: William Alderman and his girlfriend broke into vacation homes and used her 3-year-old daughter to help carry out the crimes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Hammered on a Sailboat
programme.desc: A fugitive murders a man and flees to New York, where he plans a daring escape, while another breaks out of jail by overpowering a guard.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fetch a Hooker
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet, a muscle man for a drug dealer, liked to test fate. One night on a job to pick up a prostitute, Slettvet stabs a man. He tries to stay under the radar, but still goes to parties for the drugs.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Two Homes in Mexico
programme.desc: Gonzolo Martinez is a 17-year old gang member, sentenced to 48 years in prison. A chance arises, and Martinez escapes to Mexico and becomes a drug dealer. Only when Martinez tries to cross the border, do the feds get their chance to capture him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Hammered on a Sailboat
programme.desc: A fugitive murders a man and flees to New York, where he plans a daring escape, while another breaks out of jail by overpowering a guard.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fetch a Hooker
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet, a muscle man for a drug dealer, liked to test fate. One night on a job to pick up a prostitute, Slettvet stabs a man. He tries to stay under the radar, but still goes to parties for the drugs.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Two Homes in Mexico
programme.desc: Gonzolo Martinez is a 17-year old gang member, sentenced to 48 years in prison. A chance arises, and Martinez escapes to Mexico and becomes a drug dealer. Only when Martinez tries to cross the border, do the feds get their chance to capture him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Vacation Homes
programme.desc: William Alderman and his girlfriend broke into vacation homes and used her 3-year-old daughter to help carry out the crimes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be the 'Green Baron'
programme.desc: Tony Darwin makes millions piloting marijuana into Florida. Even after getting caught, he continues works for a notorious smuggler until a deadly plane crash forces him to flee the country.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Picture-Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson invites five of America's finest cookie makers to take on the world of fine art by assembling spectacular cookie mosaics. Judges Ree Drummond, Dwayne Ingraham and Gesine Prado decide if all the pieces fall into place.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Colors of Christmas
programme.desc: Five creative cookie makers are dreaming of a white Christmas as Eddie Jackson challenges them to decorate cookies using only detail, texture and relief.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Bright Lights, Big Cookies

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Christmas Traditions

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Christmas Mischief

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Center of the Season
programme.desc: Five of the most talented cookie makers in America strive for the spotlight when Eddie Jackson presents the most difficult decorating challenge of all -- the dreaded slice-and-bake.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Homemade Holidays
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson cherishes homemade gifts that come from the heart, so he asks five of the top cookie makers to create cookies that look like handcrafted gifts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Five Bbq Chicken Favorites

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Whole Animals

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fishing For Fire
programme.desc: In a pit, under a kettle, or in between hunks of heavy metal, Roger's showing off three flame-licking good feasts that are packing high heat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Women Fire Food

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Escape From Unwish Island/ The Gland Plan
programme.desc: Timmy's unwished wishes come back for revenge; Cosmo might lose his job as godparent.

programme.title: Movie: Rio
programme.desc: When a domesticated parrot in Minnesota meets the bird of his dreams, they take off to Rio de Janeiro.

programme.title: Invader Zim: The Most Horrible C-mas Ever
programme.desc: Sludgy the Robotic Snowman tells the story of the most horrible C-mas ever, when Zim created a Santa suit that came to life and tried to destroy Earth.

programme.title: Danny Phantom: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Danny's attempts to stop Skulker's looting spree are thwarted by his new sidekick, Jazz.

programme.title: The Loud House: Ruthless People/ What Wood Lincoln Do?
programme.desc: When the house is infested with termites, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others with Aunt Ruth.Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: The Loud House: House Music/ A Novel Idea
programme.desc: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 33
programme.desc: After a small toy clogs the toilet and leaves only one working bathroom, the kids band together on a chaotic mission to dislodge the toy.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 34
programme.desc: A small hole in the ship threatening the oxygen supply can only be repaired from the outside, forcing Martin to become to first kid to ever attempt a spacewalk.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away
programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Hat for Pat/ Toy Store of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job as a sign-holder. SpongeBob and Patrick spend the night locked in a toy store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to save him. After failing to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Super Evil Aquatic Villain Team Up Is Go/ Chum FRICASSee
programme.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and then-the world! Hahahahahaha!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Abrasive Side
programme.desc: SpongeBob orders a product called 'The Abrasive Side' in order to help him say no.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Life in a Day/ Sun Bleached
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Texas/ Walking Small
programme.desc: Sandy is homesick for 'good ol' Texas'; Plankton convinces SpongeBob to be mean.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Trenchbillies/ Sponge-Cano
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick fall into a cavern where frightful Trenchbillies keep them hostage.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Buster Moves/ To Cop or Not to Cop
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast-paced, zany city-wide chase. Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mas-termind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Handle With Car/ The Silver Blur
programme.desc: Everyday heroes work together to stop a mysterious master criminal.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Harl Hubbs Day/ Ann They're Off
programme.desc: It's Harl Hubbs Day and Harl decides to help the whole city, but quickly discovers he wasn't prepared for Harl mania. Billy's mother, Ann, accepts a junkyard race challenge against the city's street racing legend, Tread Octane.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Bob and Clemmons' Excellent Adventure/ The Man with No Name with A Name
programme.desc: We pull back the curtain to see how Firemen Bob and Clemmons retrieve the bizarre requests of Chief Freya during a typical emergency. It's an old west showdown when a new adversary rolls into town.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Daisy Chain Gang/ Backdraft to School
programme.desc: Fendrich organizes a charity as a distraction while he attempts to steal the city deed. Sinclair gathers antiheroes to stop him. Freya is one credit short of graduating from the fire academy and is suspended as Fire Chief.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Running Mates/ Dirty Duke
programme.desc: Mayor Fleck is running for re-election against Fendrich, who will stop at nothing to win. Duke loses his memory.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: For Wheeler/ Brickmuda Heptagon
programme.desc: When Rooky discovers it's Chief Wheeler's birthday, she is determined to make it memorable. During the dedication ceremony of the city's deep sea vessel to honor Duke, Freya and Harl, the ship is accidentally set adrift.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: The Quacken/ The Treasure of Nosepatch
programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it. Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Midden Fleasure/ Tread or Alive
programme.desc: Fendrich and his gang learn of Cluster's hidden junkyard treasure. Harl Cluster, Shirley and Tread unite to protect it. Snake and Daisy take advantage of Tread to get him to act as their getaway driver to pull off a heist.

programme.title: Movie: Rio
programme.desc: When a domesticated parrot in Minnesota meets the bird of his dreams, they take off to Rio de Janeiro.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Shiny Teeth/ Odd Odd West

programme.title: Movie: Overboard
programme.desc: After he falls overboard, a wealthy and ill-mannered yacht owner washes ashore with amnesia in a small town where a mistreated former employee decides to teach him a lesson by pretending to be his wife, but the two begin to fall for each other.

programme.title: Movie: 27 Dresses

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Susan Smith: The Shocking Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Hundreds of people vanished without a trace in the mid 1970s, leaving their families was distraught and wondering about them for decades. In March 1997, shocking news of a mysterious religious group made world headlines.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of the Killer Nanny
programme.desc: When an eight-month-old baby is fatally injured while in the care of his nanny Louise Woodward, was is abuse or an accident?

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: John Lennon Assassination
programme.desc: In 1980, the entire world was stunned by the murder of John Lennon. Was Mark Chapman a cold-blooded killer or a seriously deranged young man? We will backtrack through the lives of both men to set the scene through interviews and footage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bologna Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads to Pennsylvania and tries his hand at making bologna and then goes to Alaska to repair a very special toilet.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Termite Researcher
programme.desc: Mike visits with long-time fans Marilyn and Carolyn Maedel to look at never-before-seen footage at a crawfish factory in Louisiana. Then, he experiences the many hands-on duties that come with being a termite researcher on Sapolo Island in Georgia.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Reef Ball Maker
programme.desc: Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty in order to help create an artificial underwater reef. It's a dirty job that is helping to revitalize fish and coral populations in areas that have been devastated by pollution.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sea Lamprey Exterminator
programme.desc: In Michigan, Mike helps the U.S. Department of Fish & Wildlife control the sea lamprey population that is jeopardizing the fishing industry of the Great Lakes. Then at Mandalay Bay Casino Mike makes 'meat gel' to feed the fish in the shark reef aquarium.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Date Palm Pollenator
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs where he collects pollen from male date palm pods and pollinates female trees. He also shows never before seen footage and answers viewer mail.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bone Black
programme.desc: Mike heads to Michigan where he gets dirty in the Bone Black plant. He then meets with twin sisters who are huge fans of the show.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Rendering
programme.desc: Mike heads to Southern California to find out what it takes to keep a tar pit clean. Then Mike travels north where he learns about rendering and discovers how much of a farm animal can be recycled.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Blueberry Connoisseur
programme.desc: Mike creates an 'interesting' flavour at the Jelly Belly Candy Company.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Fuel Tank Cleaner
programme.desc: Mike Rowe travels to the McConnell Air Force Base in Wichita, Kansas to join forces and clean the Stratotanker fuel tanks. Mike learns what it takes to keep the KC-135 Stratotanker in mid-air as the job gets messy, gooey and downright dirty.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Geoduck Farmer
programme.desc: Mike is waist deep in mud as he harvest clams in the cold waters of Puget Sound. In an attempt to preserve to environment, Mike gets dirty in California's Santa Monica Mountains before helping to restore Philadelphia's church's antique pipe organ.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Skull Cleaner
programme.desc: Mike Rowe helps keeps trains on track before linking Sausages, a southern delicacy that's no treat to make. Before animal skulls and bones are put on display, they have to be cleaned by Mike.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Hot Tar Roofer
programme.desc: Mike gets filthy dirty as he tackles the profession of hot tar roofing a church rooftop.

programme.title: Secret America
programme.desc: They are the most iconic symbols of America, but lurking behind each one are conspiracy theories, myths, and lies.

programme.title: Secret America
programme.desc: They are the most iconic symbols of America: but lurking behind each one are conspiracy theories, myths, and lies.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Wild Alaska Cruises - Mark Few
programme.desc: We go fishing in Alaska with basketball coach Mark Few.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: From the Ground Up
programme.desc: A look at advances in renewable resources.

programme.title: The Elite Fishing League: Winning Ways Feature from Round 5
programme.desc: A look back at the previous rounds.

programme.title: The Anglerschannel Bass Wrap Up Show: December
programme.desc: We do some Carolina Riggin' on Lake Guntersville, and continue our talk with Pro Charging systems. We also look back at the year's events.

programme.title: Ocean Legacy: Best of Ocean Legacy
programme.desc: A look at season one's highlights.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: Best of the Bayou
programme.desc: A look at highlights from the past year.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Lost Gold of Paradise Hill
programme.desc: Tony fires up a second plant to haul in gold left behind by the old-timers. Tensions rise when Parker departs for Alaska, leaving Mitch in charge. Rick faces disaster when he his sluice box springs a leak.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Fistful of Nuggets
programme.desc: Dustin's gamble of investing his life savings into these claims pays off after Carlos removes a monster boulder and finds chunky nuggets. Fred and crew battle the Trifecta, and a game-changing discovery proves Fred's theory of the ancient waterfall.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: California Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hudson Valley Retreat
programme.desc: Peter and Ashley Jensen build a sustainable straw bale panel house in the Hudson Valley, the first of its kind in the States. With only three months to work, the race against nature is as they attempt to finish before the East Coast winter sets in.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Friend or Boyfriend?
programme.desc: Moriah decides that it's time to keep her promise to Max, and she introduces him to her family. Ethan and Olivia continue to mend their marriage, but Olivia is crushed when she hears some disappointing news.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: My Best Girls
programme.desc: One mother helps her son buy lingerie to spice up his sex life, while another crashes her son's Valentine's Day date.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: You're Not Invited
programme.desc: Matt wants to spend Valentine's Day with his mom, while Shekeb disinvites his mom to date night. Justina's first steps toward wedding planning are overtaken by her future mother-in-law, Annette.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Don't Leave Me This Way
programme.desc: Emily reacts to Shekeb ditching her to tend to his mother. Stephanie finds herself struggling to win Liz's acceptance. Jason shares bad news with his mom.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Mother-Son Tango
programme.desc: Jason's mom has an odd request for their wedding dance. Mike defends Stephanie to his mother. Kelly intrudes on a romantic dinner between Matt and Kim, and Emily finds herself in the hot seat at Laila's birthday party.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Who's That Girl?
programme.desc: Laila ambushes Shekeb and Emily with an unwelcome surprise. At Justina's request, Jason asks his mother to butt out of wedding planning. A visit with the architect proves Matt's mom has shocking plans for their new house.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Mommy's Choice
programme.desc: Steph makes an attempt to bond with Liz. Justina and her sisters fight off Annette's wedding dress demands. Emily gives Shekeb an ultimatum after being humiliated by Laila again.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Tell What?
programme.desc: Kim finds herself losing patience with Matt and Kelly. Justina finally confronts Annette. Laila learns Shekeb wants to move out of her house.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: It's Beginning to Look a Lot like Quintmas
programme.desc: After getting bad news about Hazel, Danielle's determined to make this the best Christmas ever. But Adam has different plans for the holiday, which may sour the celebration. The quints perform in the Christmas show, but stage fright may take center stage.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: I'm Dreaming of a Cajun Christmas
programme.desc: Danielle and Adam are determined to give their daughters the best Christmas ever. But as their plans start to crumble, so does Danielle.

programme.title: Four Houses: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: Florist David puts his California ranch up against math coach Marcy's bay front home, software company CEO Andrew's Spanish colonial and stay-at-home mom Tanja's Tuscan villa.

programme.title: Four Houses: Deck the Halls
programme.desc: In New York, Marie puts her refined holiday decorations up against Kevin's Christmas light spectacular.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection 2
programme.desc: Follow four Christmas fanatics as they reveal the amount of time, money and effort they put into their obsessions all year-round.

programme.title: Extreme Christmas Trees
programme.desc: Captures the anticipation, excitement and sheer joy embodied by the ultimate Christmas icon: The Christmas Tree.

programme.title: Invasion of the Christmas Lights
programme.desc: This holiday special criss-crosses the U.S. to chronicle families of extreme Christmas lighting enthusiasts, and documenting their glorious, outrageous and elaborate displays.

programme.title: Invasion of the Christmas Lights 2
programme.desc: We criss-cross the U.S. and visit six homes where wizards of light out-do the neighbours and put on holiday displays that dazzle.

programme.title: Holiday ER
programme.desc: When a man dressed as Santa is near death, his wife asks his doctor for a special favour. A man has a live fish stuck in his throat, an elf is in distress and a boy has a blue leg that defies diagnosis.

programme.title: Santa Sent Me to the ER
programme.desc: It's 'Ho, Ho, Oh No!' as we unwrap the hilarious details of what really happens when Christmas cheer leads to 'Oh Dear.' Real people confess how their holiday dreams turned into yuletide nightmares full of bumps, bruises and broken Christmas spirits.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Night of the Full Moon
programme.desc: Spooky cases leave doctors proclaiming, 'It must be a full moon.'

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 34

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek Beyond

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Slump, a Cross and Roadside Gravel

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Seasonings Greetings
programme.desc: The stakes are high during the holidays for four chefs as they attempt to make their best holiday starter using only every other aisle of the store.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: All-Star Holiday
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri recruit three all-star chefs to play holiday games in their home kitchens. The Fieris send groceries and an oversized stocking filled with holiday sweets that the chefs must incorporate into two different seasonal dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Culinary All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy's family loves cooking at home and great restaurant food, so they're combining the best of both worlds by firing up takeout with a twist. On the menu, there's tandoor chicken poutine and polenta flavour bomb, arancini and empandas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pork Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up all things pork. From Connecticut to California, and international favorites to American classics, Guy is digging into pork in more way than you can count.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Porkapalooza
programme.desc: Guy goes coast to coast to try pulled pork and andouille sausage.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Layers of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's firin' up the grill and stacking up the flavour. In Toronto, Canada, the restored diner cooking up pork belly, a mac and cheese burger and a Christmas burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian, Thai and Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a righteous time revisiting joints offering everything from pie to Thai. In Honolulu, a family spot going strong with their specialties straight out of Thailand.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Guy's Going Home
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hittin' up some of his favourite hometown haunts. First, he pops into a Mexican joint right in his Santa Rosa, Calif., 'hood, where he chows on the pozole every time he's off the road.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Pot Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts things off internationally as he brings the whole family to his favourite jerk joint in Ocho Rios, Jamaica. Then it's back to the States, where a cafeteria in Tucker, Ga. hasn't changed a thing - including its true Southern staples.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Winter Wonderland Party
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts a holiday party for kids and transforms the house into a winter wonderland complete with snow globes and snowflakes. On the menu is creamy tomato soup, triple chocolate hot cocoa, crispy chicken sandwiches and Italian cookies.

programme.title: Baked in Vermont: Vermont Tree Juice
programme.desc: Late spring in Vermont can only mean one thing - maple syrup. Gesine Prado is baking up a big brunch with what remains of last season's maple syrup harvest while her husband, Ray, is in the yard tapping the trees for this year's crop.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Weekend Guest
programme.desc: Ina makes spicy hermit bars and tomato carpaccio for her friend's visit.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: I'm Dreaming of a White ... Elephant?
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites her pals Melissa Peterman and Nicole Sullivan over for a white elephant gift exchange because one person's disaster is another person's delight.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: New Holiday Faves
programme.desc: Ree Drummond gets in the holiday spirit with apple, brie and mushrooms en croute, traditional eggnog in a ginger crumb-rimmed glass and an ugly sweater cake. She also makes berry basil vodka and festive marinated olives for a happy hour gift basket.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Holidays
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is tackling holiday questions, and the answers include outrageously cheesy lasagna dip and chips and a big festive salad perfect to take to any potluck bash. She covers make-ahead dessert questions with festive cinnamon apples.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboy Cookie Swap
programme.desc: Ree Drummond gets ready for a cookie swap where there's no actual swapping, just four awesome cowboys swinging by to fill up their cookie plates with festive treats! There will be cinnamon roll cookies, red velvet crinkle cookies, and more.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Never Enough Puff
programme.desc: Ree shares her top five favorite things to do with puffed pastry, her secret weapon for entertaining made easy! First, cheese straws and sausage parmesan palmiers are a duo of divine quick and easy canapes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Holiday Spirit
programme.desc: Molly Yeh celebrates her favourite time of the year by making a festive buffet for three generations of the family. There are pastrami meatballs, brussels sprouts latkes, rolled potato flatbreads and her speculoos-inspired airline cookie sheet cakes.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Tree Trimming Party
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood takes inspiration from holiday traditions and invites friends and family to her home for a tree-trimming party. This celebration of good company and great food includes a menu of toasted gruyere and cranberry cups.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Best of Barefoot Comfort: Make-Ahead
programme.desc: Ina Garten is serving up her top make-ahead dishes from over the years, including Moroccan lamb tagine and a showstopping chocolate banana cream pie. Plus, crusty baked shells and cauliflower is perfect for weeknights.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Celebration Sides
programme.desc: Ina Garten lifts the veil on all her tips, sharing techniques and incredible elegant and easy recipes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Home Cooked for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts create a home-cooked holiday menu inspired by their own traditions, starting with Geoffrey Zakarian's Moroccan-spiced pork rack paired with Katie Lee's spinach and three cheese phyllo pie.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Party Delights
programme.desc: Nine bakers must create a dessert with an unusual candy cane flavor then use a holiday cocktail as inspiration for the main heat. One baker is sent home.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Season of Sharing
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, eight bakers team up to make a dozen hand pies in a festive holiday shapes. For the main heat, bakers create a dessert duo inspired by classic holiday flavor combinations.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Squab, Squab, Squab, Squab, Squab

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop
programme.desc: Charlie puts himself in a compromising position when he spends a drunken evening with his stalker, Rose. Later, he comes face-to-face with her father, who demands to know what Charlie's intentions are with his daughter.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Apologies for the Frivolity

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Release the Dogs
programme.desc: Unable to sleep, Alan takes one of Charlie's suggestions and goes for a jog on the beach. When his jog takes a disastrous turn, he then turns to a psychiatrist in the hopes that discovering the source of his insomnia will help alleviate it.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Walnuts and Demerol
programme.desc: As Charlie prepares for a steamy Christmas Eve with his date, friends and family keep dropping in and staying. When Evelyn discovers who Charlie's date is, she inexplicably becomes desperate to break them up before they go too far.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Smooth as a Ken Doll
programme.desc: As Judith and Herb's wedding nears, Charlie gets a bit too close to Herb's witty sister.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Aunt Myra Doesn't Pee a Lot

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Is There a Mrs. Waffles?

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Mooch at the Boo

programme.desc: Tia Maria Torres works to save pit bulls from dangerous and abusive situations.

programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Baiters Beware

programme.title: North Woods Law: Antlers and Antics

programme.title: Ultimate Rides: Ultimate Monster Trucks

programme.title: Life: Insects

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted
programme.desc: Explore the world of the carnivores, from cats and dogs to bears and dolphins that must make a kill in order to survive. To win, they must overcome the weapons, intelligence and speed of their prey.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Amazon
programme.desc: Steven Backshall investigates what make the Amazon so diverse. He looks at the nutrient poor nature of the rainforest and discusses the strategies used by the life in the jungle to make the most of the little nutrients available.

programme.title: Chimp Sanctuary
programme.desc: Sue Perkins travels to Chimp Haven, the US national chimpanzee sanctuary in Louisiana, to visit six female ex-laboratory chimpanzees starting retirement.

programme.title: Life: Plants
programme.desc: Enter the world of plants as time-lapse technology makes this violent and self-seeking organism's behaviour a truly dynamic and surprisingly emotional experience.

programme.title: Life: Creatures of the Deep
programme.desc: A journey into the uncharted corners of the ocean where the newest discoveries are being made and where the strangest sea creatures can be found.

programme.title: Life: Primates
programme.desc: By studying the world of primates in new and intimate detail, this episode offers fresh insight into the development of intelligence and social behaviour.

programme.title: Movie: Run All Night

programme.title: Movie: Road to Perdition
programme.desc: Loyalties are put to the test when a hitman's son witnesses what he does for a living and the tables turn on him and his family.

programme.title: Movie: Public Enemies
programme.desc: The true story of John Dillinger, a notorious bank robber from 1930s Chicago. He loved his life and had the run of the city without fear of persecution. He met the woman of his dreams and fell in love, but was constantly hunted by the FBI.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Maximum Molly

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Clash of Titans
programme.desc: It's a battle for blood as lions go head to head, a grey wolf pack takes on a grizzly bear, hippos hammer out a violent battle and one of the world's largest monkeys plans a mission to murder.

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Fangs of Fury
programme.desc: Explore some of the planet's deadliest jaws, from ambush experts with piercing canines, to slithering assassins with fangs of death.

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Power Struggles

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Rampage!
programme.desc: The war between hunters and the hunted over food and territory continues relentlessly.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ghost Village
programme.desc: Expert historians uncover evidence of a mysterious and horrifying Nazi blitzkrieg which could rank as the worst atrocity of World War II.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Death Before Marriage
programme.desc: Carol has been waiting 25 years to marry the love of her life, Jack Parkes. Six weeks away from their wedding in Kennedy Township, PA, she finds him shot in the head in their living room. The murder will destroy her life and uncover dark family secrets.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: No Giving Up
programme.desc: When Marty finds his big brother Mike Rust's home in disarray with a motorcycle missing, the Saguache, Colorado, community leaves no stone unturned searching for one of their own. The case goes cold as years pass, but the local rumor mill heats up.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Farmer's Daughter
programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Hustlers
programme.desc: The real-life story that inspired a hit movie. A group of strip club workers take business into their own hands going as far as conspiring to drug male targets and fleece them for all they could.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chameleon
programme.desc: '20/20' reports on a murder mystery that unraveled across the country for over three decades, including details about how cutting edge DNA technology and a mysterious five-year-old girl provided crucial clues that helped authorities solve the case.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chameleon
programme.desc: '20/20' reports on a murder mystery that unraveled across the country for over three decades, including details about how cutting edge DNA technology and a mysterious five-year-old girl provided crucial clues that helped authorities solve the case.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Affair
programme.desc: After one partner in a marriage has an affair, the wife says she's moving forward. But with hidden back accounts, DNA testing kits and a gun, the woman is becoming unhinged. A deadly act of revenge leaves just one person to tell the tale.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chameleon
programme.desc: '20/20' reports on a murder mystery that unraveled across the country for over three decades, including details about how cutting edge DNA technology and a mysterious five-year-old girl provided crucial clues that helped authorities solve the case.
