programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Can Words Kill?
programme.desc: A teenager commits suicide. And, in the aftermath, his parents discover an online relationship far deeper and far darker than they had realized.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: NXIVM
programme.desc: The leader of NXIM is accused of operating a secret sorority that treated women a slaves and branded them for life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Unspeakable Acts
programme.desc: Greed and lust drove these deadly women to unspeakable acts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: Find out what made these women so angry that they turned on the ones they loved.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies
programme.desc: Investigators must cast a wide net for clues when the family of Breckenridge resident Sharon Garrison report her missing. There's evidence to suggest she's skipped town, but a set of secret cassette tapes soon point to something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Close friends are investigated after the death of an 83-year-old grandfather who was having an affair with a woman half his age.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Evil in South Texas
programme.desc: Billy Staton and his fiancé Leticia Castro vanish without a trace. Have they left town and eloped? The discovery of Billy's burnt out car and a shock confession, reveal a web of lies that only a secret recording can untangle the truth.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Diabolical: Control Freak
programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Kill Shot
programme.desc: The FBI is quickly running out of options to save a woman and her toddler from a kidnapper hell bent on murder. To get them out alive, an ingenious plan challenges the elite Hostage Rescue Team to lure the suspect into a sniper's crosshairs.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf
programme.desc: The FBI's in a race against time once an IED is discovered along a Spokane, WA parade route. It's a hunt that will take them all across the Pacific Northwest for a lone wolf suspect before he tries to strike again.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Mob Boss: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence, but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Mob Boss: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence, but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf
programme.desc: The FBI's in a race against time once an IED is discovered along a Spokane, WA parade route. It's a hunt that will take them all across the Pacific Northwest for a lone wolf suspect before he tries to strike again.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Kill Shot
programme.desc: The FBI is quickly running out of options to save a woman and her toddler from a kidnapper hell bent on murder. To get them out alive, an ingenious plan challenges the elite Hostage Rescue Team to lure the suspect into a sniper's crosshairs.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Hitler's Zombie Army
programme.desc: Truth is revealed of the Allied 'monument men' discovery in 1945 of rotting corpses of Germanic heroes. A world of magic, high priests and secret castles is exposed.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Shaw Camp Re-Imagination

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lakeside Lounging on Lake Gaston
programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Down in Deep Creek, Maryland
programme.desc: A family of six looks for a vacation home on Deep Creek Lake in Maryland. They find the lakefront property of their dreams but it's in need of some major renovations.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories on Lake Martin
programme.desc: A blended family of eight finds a vacation home on Lake Martin, Alabama, but the property needs major renovations. He's a contractor and is ready to get to work with a tight budget and a long to-do list to help the family realize their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Build
programme.desc: A family looks for a vacation home on Logan Martin Lake, Alabama, in hopes of getaways filled with fishing, kayaking and relaxation. They find a fixer-upper with water views, but the extensive renovations may break the budget.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lone Star State Update
programme.desc: After spending years living all over the world, Teresa and Jeremy find the perfect vacation home for their family in their home state of Texas. They're ready to put down roots, but their new lakefront home is in need of some TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big-Time Brother Rebuild in Rhode Island
programme.desc: Business partner brothers look for a vacation home in Coventry, RI. Their real estate agent finds the perfect lakefront fixer-upper, but the to-do list is long and the brothers quickly run into many structural issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Family Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family. They find a charmer with plenty of space for up to 30 people, but their DIY reno reveals unexpected issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Austin Sweet Freeze
programme.desc: Austin can get sweltering hot but they have plenty of delicious options to keep you cool. At Cow Tipping Creamery, Corey Sorensen is making stackers, her layered version of a sundae.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mornings in Sunny L.A.
programme.desc: Visit some Los Angeles hotspots that are the sweetest places to start the day.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Toronto Sweets
programme.desc: We head north of the border to Toronto.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cool Cookie Sandwiches
programme.desc: There's nothing better than the perfect cookie unless you take two of them and put some filling in between.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Classic desserts get deliciously updated at three sweet shops across the country. Skull and Cakebones rocks vegan cupcakes in Austin, Texas, with flavors like basil berry, dirty chai and just beet it.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cute and Sweet
programme.desc: Today we visit three locations that pack big flavors in small servings. First stop is Cake Monkey Bakery in Los Angeles to try some of their mini layer cakes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Eats
programme.desc: It's time for some good, old-fashioned country cooking as Guy Fieri, Alton Brown, Sunny Anderson and Duff Goldman round up their favorite Southern eats.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Chicago's Cutting Edge
programme.desc: Andrew explores the driving forces behind the cutting edge food scene in Chicago. From exotic ingredients to innovative techniques, food suppliers in the Windy City are pushing the limits.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Baltimore and Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: There's a long line of tradition on the menu when Andrew visits Baltimore and the Chesapeake Bay.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Goa
programme.desc: Andrew explores the local cuisine of Goa, a former Portuguese colony in western India.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the elaborate feasts, home-cooked comfort food, sushi and confections of Kyoto, Japan. From the artistic multi-course dining experience to the everyday humble comfort foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snowball Effect/ One Krab's Trash
programme.desc: Pat and SpongeBob play in the snow; Mr. Krabs sells trash as antiques.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chum Bucket Supreme/ Single Cell Anniversary
programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: The Monster Who Came to Bikini Bottom /Welcome to Bikini Bottom Triangle
programme.desc: A monster terrorizes Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature. Then, SpongeBob and all the Bikini Bottom citizens disappear to an underwater resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Ghoul Fools
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get caught in the feud between a crew of ghost pirates and the Flying Dutchman.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Beyond the Known Universe
programme.desc: The Team meets a strange alien robot called the Fugitoid.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Moons of Thalos 3
programme.desc: When the Team crash lands on an ice moon along with the enemy, they must put their differences aside to survive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Weird World of Wyrm
programme.desc: When Casey discovers a hypercube, he unleashes a 4th dimensional being: Wyrm.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Outlaw Armaggon
programme.desc: When Lord Dregg hires a bounty hunter to destroy the Turtles, the team flees to an abandoned space station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Riddle of the Ancient Aeons
programme.desc: The Turtles find themselves on a planet of pure evil.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Journey to the Center of Mikey's Mind
programme.desc: When microscopic aliens invade Mikey's mind, the Turtles have to chase them through the strange world of Mikey's subconscious.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Arena of Carnage
programme.desc: The Turtles are captured and thrown into the Triceraton Arena!

programme.title: Danger Force: Santa
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Unleashed: Watch Like A Hawk!
programme.desc: Impressive animal acts compete for the title of 'Most Entertaining Pet.'

programme.title: The Substitute
programme.desc: Celebrities are transformed to go undercover as substitute teachers to surprise a class.

programme.title: Top Elf
programme.desc: 'Elf-testants' compete in holiday-themed challenges to have their wish lists granted.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry and the Bad Girl
programme.desc: A gang of artists is spray-painting graffiti all over Swellview. While confronting them, Kid Danger is tempted by a cute girl in the gang, forcing him to choose between her and Captain Man.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Captain Man: On Vacation
programme.desc: Ray has trusted Henry and Charlotte with protecting Swellview while he's out of town at his cousin's wedding. Problems arise when they find themselves having to handle things on their own.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Time Jerker
programme.desc: When Kid Danger and Captain Man battle the Time Jerker, Kid Danger accidentally falls into the Time Jerker's time machine and relives the same day over again.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Secret Beef
programme.desc: With an invitation to Swellview's most exclusive restaurant, Henry decides to bring his boss, Ray, but finds it more complicated than expected.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry's Jelly
programme.desc: After Jasper is lauded for being a local hero, Henry becomes jealous that Kid Danger is the one getting thanks while Henry himself gets nothing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Phineas and Ferb Family Christmas/ S'Winter
programme.desc: The boys decide to put on a traditional family Christmas special featuring their family, friends and guests. Featuring new holiday songs including: Buford and Baljeet sing 'Good King Wenceslas' and the whole gang sings 'We Wish You a Merry Christmas.'

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Present
programme.desc: When Hiro finds a wrapped present in the closet, he assumes it's from Aunt Cass and takes it in order to figure out what it is. However, after a mix-up, the present becomes lost and Hiro enlists the Big Hero 6 team to track it down.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Never Smooch a Snake
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Old Man and the Goose
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular

programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!

programme.desc: Rick has the chance to buy a flamethrower and Corey and Chumlee head to an auction to bid on a classic gypsy fortune-teller machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bumpy Ride
programme.desc: The guys have the chance to add a Grammy to their collection; Corey and Chumlee want to buy a rare mini Coca Cola cooler from the 1930's.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bow Legged
programme.desc: The guys are presented with a unique item, a pirate's peg leg. Also, Rick has the opportunity to buy an archery bow.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Arguments for the Quickie
programme.desc: When Charlie finds out that Mia is in town with her dance troupe, he opts not to see her and tries to convince Alan that he's over her. Charlie gets another surprise when Mia explains that she wants something personal from him, his sperm.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Pistol-Packin' Hermaphrodite
programme.desc: Wedding bells loom as Charlie and Mia make their wedding plans, but when their families meet, things immediately begin to fall apart. Ultimately, Charlie and his bride-to-be end up deciding on a small ceremony in Vegas.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Monkey
programme.desc: Ross introduces the guys to his new roommate, Marcel, who happens to be a monkey. Meanwhile, Chandler suggests a 'no-date New Year's Eve', which no one is really excited about.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Dad
programme.desc: Phoebe travels to upstate New York in an attempt to locate her father.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Quits
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey convince Rachel to quit her job because she hates making coffee.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Girl From Poughkeepsie
programme.desc: Ross struggles to maintain a long-distance relationship with a girl from Poughkeepsie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: And the Plot Moistens
programme.desc: Jake's teacher, Francine, calls Alan and Judith in to discuss Jake's lack of interest in school. Desperate to communicate with someone intelligent while continuing to see his airhead girlfriend, Kandi, Alan starts a platonic relationship with Francine.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Once With Aunt Sophie
programme.desc: When a cute girl from Jake's school invites him to a party, Charlie butts in on Alan's milestone moment with his son by offering his own words of wisdom on women.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Fair Weather Friends
